fear_triggers: Your stomach twists. Something is wrong inside. Empty feelin

long_term.event: A soft thing is on the ground in front of you. It is a berry. Light slowly coming back.
long_term.thought: confused. nothing working.

long_term.event: You find a dark opening in the rock wall. Cool air comes out of it. Light slowly coming back.
long_term.thought: Eyes heavy. World is gone. Need to stop.

long_term.event: You are lying down. Ground is hard but you are still.
long_term.thought: Everything is new. Move feet. See more.

long_term.event: A loud crack sound from above. Very bright light. Then loud boom.
long_term.thought: Everything is new. Move feet. See more.
long_term.outcome: You moved. New ground under feet. Nothing different yet.

long_term.event: The light is fading. Air getting colder.
long_term.thought: Body shaking. Sky water cold. Find dry place.
long_term.outcome: You moved. New ground under feet. Nothing different yet.

long_term.event: No light. Cannot see. Sounds in the dark.
long_term.thought: Eyes heavy. World is gone. Need to stop.

long_term.event: The ground here is softer. Easier to walk. Cold air pushes hard. Cannot see much. Dark.
long_term.thought: Eyes heavy. World is gone. Need to stop.
long_term.outcome: Darkness. Then light again. Body feels less heavy.

long_term.event: Water falls from above. Cold. Everything getting wet. Cold air pushes hard. Cannot see much. Dark.
long_term.thought: Wet. Cool. Want to feel in mouth.
long_term.outcome: Darkness. Then light again. Body feels less heavy.

long_term.event: Water falls from above. Cold. Everything getting wet. Cold air pushes hard. Light slowly coming back.
long_term.thought: Wet. Cool. Want to feel in mouth.

long_term.event: You notice a sweet smell coming from low to the ground, nearby. Cold air pushes hard.
long_term.thought: Smell good. Hunger hurts. Want to put in mouth.

long_term.event: Something large and dark is watching you from far away. It has not moved. Cold air pushes hard.
long_term.thought: Eyes heavy. World is gone. Need to stop.

long_term.event: You see a tall thing with many arms reaching upward. Something hangs from it. Cold air pushes hard.
long_term.thought: Body shaking. Sky water cold. Find dry place.

long_term.event: The light is fading. Air getting colder. Cold air pushes hard.
long_term.thought: Body shaking. Sky water cold. Find dry place.

long_term.event: Something moves in the tall grass. You cannot see what. Cannot see much. Dark.

long_term.outcome: Darkness. Then light again. Body feels less heavy.
